Details: Handles user authentication session management and security controls
users - User accounts and profile data
Users can register with valid email and password
Users can login with email/password or social auth
Implement secure JWT token generation and validation. Create middleware for token verification and refresh mechanism. Ensure tokens expire appropriately and refresh tokens are rotated.
Build complete session management system with Redis or database storage. Handle concurrent sessions multiple device login and session invalidation on logout.
Create role-based access control with hierarchical roles. Define permissions per role and enforce in middleware. Support custom roles and department-specific permissions.
Implement Google and Facebook OAuth integration. Handle account linking profile sync and social-only registration flows.
Implement bcrypt password hashing password strength validation and breach detection. Add MFA support with TOTP.
Add comprehensive audit logging for all auth events. Track login attempts password changes and role assignments with IP and user agent.
